{{Infobox religious building
| name = Amehikake- Shrine (Q135289776)
| native_name = 天日陰比咩神社
| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Amehikake- Shrine'''|天日陰比咩神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
** Series ordinal: 1811
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182361</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182361</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1820

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|ja|能登国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11612019|1=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province}}
** Series ordinal: 19
** P155: {{ill|Kafutohikono Shrine|lt=Kafutohikono Shrine|qid=Q135040316|1=Kafutohikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Toriyahikono Shrine|lt=Toriyahikono Shrine|qid=Q135040318|1=Toriyahikono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Noto Province|lt=Noto Province|cs|Provincie Noto|de|Provinz Noto|en|Noto Province|es|Provincia de Noto|fa|ولایت نوتو|fr|Province de Noto|gl|Provincia de Noto|id|Provinsi Noto|it|Noto (provincia)|ja|能登国|ko|노토국|lt|Noto žemė|nl|Noto (provincie)|pt|Província de Noto|ru|Ното (провинция)|simple|Noto Province|sk|Noto (provincia)|sr|Провинција Ното|tr|Noto (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ното|zh_min_nan|Noto-kok|zh_yue|能登國|zh|能登國|qid=Q1047671|1=Noto Province}}
